name: Garnier Even & Bright Vitamin C+ Booster Serum,Fades Dark Marks, 100x Stronger than Vitamin C, Evens Skin Tone, with Vitamin C & Activating BHA &Niacinamide - 30ml.
breadcrumbs: Even & Bright Vitamin C+ Booster Serum,Fades Dark Marks, 100x Stronger than Vitamin C, Evens Skin Tone, with Vitamin C & Activating BHA &Niacinamide - 30ml.
description:
Garnier Even & Bright Vitamin C+ Serum: Unlock Your Skin's Radiance & Clarity!

Introducing the revolutionary Garnier Even & Bright Vitamin C+ Serum , your new secret weapon for a visibly brighter, more even, and youthful-looking complexion! This advanced serum is meticulously formulated to deliver powerful results, making it an essential addition to your daily skincare routine.

Harnessing the potent benefits of Vitamin C+ , our serum works tirelessly to target key skin concerns. Experience a dramatic reduction in the appearance of stubborn dark spots, sun spots, and post-acne marks , revealing clearer and more uniform skin tone. Beyond correction, this serum also infuses your skin with a vibrant, healthy glow, enhancing its natural luminosity.

The lightweight, fast-absorbing formula penetrates deep to deliver intense hydration and antioxidant protection, leaving your skin feeling smooth, refreshed, and revitalized. Say goodbye to dullness and hello to skin that truly glows from within!

Key Benefits You'll Love:

Visibly Reduces Dark Spots: Targets hyperpigmentation for a more even complexion.

Boosts Skin Radiance: Unlocks a healthy, luminous glow.

Evens Skin Tone: Promotes uniformity for a perfected look.

Antioxidant Power: Helps protect skin from environmental stressors.

Lightweight & Fast-Absorbing: Perfect for daily use under makeup or moisturizer.

How to use:

1. Cleanse your face with Garnier Even and Matte Cleansing Foam and pat dry.

2. Take a pea sized amount of the Vitamin C Booster Serum in your palms. Spread it between your palms without rubbing too much.

3. Dab the serum all over your face and neck using small and gentle tapping motions.

4. Follow up with the Garnier Even and Matte Vitamin C Protection Cream SPF30. For best results, use daily.

Vitamin C Booster serum guaranteed to beat all other serums.

Key Features.Targets Dark Spots: : Effectively reduces dark spots, sun spots, and post-acne marks.
Key Features.Promotes Even Skin Tone: : Achieve a more uniform and perfected complexion.
Key Features.Combats Dullness: : Revitalizes for a healthy, vibrant look.

name: Maybelline Lifter Gloss Plumping and Hydrating Lip Gloss, Shade: 009 Topaz, with Hyaluronic Acid for Super Juicy Lips with Incredible Shine, 5.4ml
breadcrumbs: Lifter Gloss Plumping and Hydrating Lip Gloss, Shade: 009 Topaz, with Hyaluronic Acid for Super Juicy Lips with Incredible Shine, 5.4ml
description:
Maybelline Topaz Lifter Gloss: Lift Your Look with Plumped, Hydrated & High-Shine Lips!

Unleash a stunning, sculpted pout with Maybelline Lifter Gloss , infused with Hyaluronic Acid for visibly fuller, hydrated lips. This innovative lip gloss delivers a gorgeous, non-sticky shine that smooths the lip surface and enhances contour. Experience an instant lip lift and a comfortable, luscious feel. Available in a range of captivating shades, Maybelline Lifter Gloss is your secret weapon for radiant, plumped-up lips with a dazzling finish.

Maybelline Lifter Gloss: Key Benefits You'll Love:

Visibly Plumps Lips: Infused with Hyaluronic Acid for a fuller, lifted appearance without stinging.

Intense Hydration: Deeply moisturizes, leaving lips feeling soft, supple, and smooth.

Glass-Like Shine: Delivers a brilliant, non-sticky, high-shine finish that catches the light.

Smoothes Lip Surface: Improves overall lip texture for a perfected look.

Comfortable Wear: Glides on effortlessly and feels lightweight, never tacky.

How to Use Your Maybelline Lifter Gloss:

Prep Lips: For best results, ensure your lips are clean and smooth.

Apply Gloss: Using the XL wand applicator, apply the Lifter Gloss directly to the center of your upper lip.

Glide Outwards: Follow your lip contour, gliding the gloss from the center outwards to the edges.

Repeat: Apply to the entire bottom lip.

Wear Alone or Layer: Wear it alone for a natural, plumped look, or layer it over your favorite Maybelline lipstick for added shine and dimension.

Ingredients

G2033552 C18-36 Acid Triglyceride, Bis-Diglyceryl Polyacyladipate-2, Pentaerythrityl Tetraisostearate, Polybutene, Tridecyl Trimellitate, Diisostearyl Malate, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Phenoxyethanol, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-Di-T-Butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Calcium Sodium Borosilicate, Sorbic Acid, Calcium Aluminum Borosilicate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Sodium Saccharin, Alumina, Synthetic Fluorphlogopite, Silica, Polybutylene Terephthalate, Trihydroxystearin, Cocos Nucifera Oil / Coconut Oil, Aluminum Hydroxide, Ethylene/Va Copolymer, Acrylates Copolymer, Tin Oxide, Magnesium Silicate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Glucomannan, Parfum / Fragrance [+/- May Contain / Peut Contenir Ci 77891 / Titanium Dioxide, Ci 77491, Ci 77492, Ci 77499 / Iron Oxides, Mica, Ci 15850 / Red 7, Ci 45410 / Red 28 Lake, Ci 15985 / Yellow 6 Lake, Ci 42090 / Blue 1 Lake, Ci 15850 / Red 6, Ci 17200 / Red 33 Lake, Ci 45380 / Red 22 Lake, Ci 19140 / Yellow 5 Lake] Fil T243599/11

Key Features.Lifter Gloss with Hyaluronic Acid: : This lip gloss formula with Hyaluronic Acid visibly smoothens lip surface and enhances lip contour, drenching lips with high shine for hydrated, fuller looking lips
Key Features.Next Level Shine: : It comes with an XL Wand to enhance lip contour with shine and transform lips in 1 swipe
Key Features.XL Wand: : For easy application on the lip contours and the whole lip.

name: Maybelline Lifter Gloss Twin Pack - Topaz + Ice - With Hyaluronic Acid for Hydrated, Fuller, Lifted Lips, 5.4ml
breadcrumbs: Lifter Gloss Twin Pack - Topaz + Ice - With Hyaluronic Acid for Hydrated, Fuller, Lifted Lips, 5.4ml
description:
Maybelline Lifter Gloss Twin Pack - Topaz + Ice: Double the Shine for Hydrated, Fuller & Lifted Lips!

Elevate your pout with the Maybelline Lifter Gloss Twin Pack , featuring the stunning Topaz and sparkling Ice shades. Each lip gloss is infused with Hyaluronic Acid to visibly deliver hydrated, fuller, and lifted lips . Experience a non-sticky, high-shine finish that smooths lip contours for a sculpted look. This 5.4ml Hyaluronic Acid lip gloss duo is your secret weapon for a luscious, radiant smile, perfect for any occasion.

Key Benefits You'll Love:

Visibly Plumps & Lifts: Hyaluronic Acid visibly enhances lip volume for a fuller, lifted appearance.

Intense Hydration: Deeply moisturizes, leaving lips feeling incredibly soft and supple.

Dual Shade Versatility: Features "Topaz" for a warm, shimmering nude and "Ice" for a crystal-clear, dazzling shine.

Non-Sticky, Glass-Like Finish: Delivers brilliant, comfortable high-shine without any tackiness.

Smooths Lip Surface: Improves overall lip texture for a perfected, irresistible look.

All-Day Comfort: Feels lightweight and luscious on the lips.

How to use

Prep Lips: For best results, ensure your lips are clean and smooth.

Apply Gloss: Using the XL wand applicator, apply your chosen Lifter Gloss (Topaz or Ice) directly to the center of your upper lip.

Glide Outwards: Follow your lip contour, gliding the gloss from the center outwards to the edges.

Repeat: Apply to the entire bottom lip.

Wear Alone or Layer: Wear alone for a natural, plumped look, or layer over your favorite Maybelline lipstick for added shine and dimension.

Key Features.Twin Pack Value: : Two popular Lifter Gloss shades in one convenient pack.
Key Features.Hyaluronic Acid Formula: : Key ingredient for superior hydration and plumping effects.
Key Features.Shades: Topaz + Ice: : A versatile combination of a shimmering nude and a clear gloss.
Key Features.Visibly Fuller Lips: : Achieves a lifted and more voluminous look.
Key Features.XL Wand Applicator: : Designed for easy, precise, one-swipe application.
Key Features.Maybelline Lifter Gloss: : Part of a cult-favorite range known for its lip-enhancing properties.

name: Maybelline Superstay Vinyl Ink Liquid Lipstick, Longwear, Smudge-free, Long Lasting up to 16hr, Highly Pigmented Color, Shine Finish - 55 Royal
breadcrumbs: Superstay Vinyl Ink Liquid Lipstick, Longwear, Smudge-free, Long Lasting up to 16hr, Highly Pigmented Color, Shine Finish - 55 Royal
description:
Maybelline SuperStay Vinyl Ink Longwear Liquid Lipstick | Shade 55 Royal

Ready to rule the world? ???? Step into your power with the Maybelline SuperStay Vinyl Ink in the gorgeous shade 55 Royal .

This rich, deep berry-wine color is absolutely stunning for whenever you want a bold, confident lip. But the best part? It delivers a flawless, high-shine glossy finish that actually stays put! Thanks to its magical Color Lock formula, you get the juicy look of a lip gloss with the transfer-proof, 16-hour staying power of a matte liquid lipstick.

No smudging, no fading, and no transferring onto your coffee cup. Just swipe, shake, and shine all day long! ✨

How to use

To get that transfer-proof glossy magic, you have to follow the golden rule: SHAKE IT!

Shake: Before opening, vigorously shake the tube for at least 5 seconds to activate the Color Lock formula.

Swipe: Apply the lipstick to clean, dry lips using the precise flocked tip applicator.

Set: Let it dry completely for about 1-2 minutes. Do not press your lips together while it dries!

Slay: Enjoy your gorgeous, glossy, budge-proof pout all day!

Key Features.The Shade: : 55 Royal is a beautiful, bold deep berry/burgundy that flatters all skin tones.
Key Features.Glossy But Smudge-Proof: : Get a brilliant, shiny finish that refuses to budge or transfer.
Key Features.Up to 16-Hour Wear: : Stays vibrant and flawless from your morning coffee to your midnight snacks.
Key Features.Instant Color Lock: : Formulated with biomimetic pigments that move with your lips for ultimate comfort.
